Loading rules: Add the using directive for Aspose.Words.Loading to access HtmlLoadOptions.
Saving/Export rules: Replace generic LoadOptions with HtmlLoadOptions when loading HTML documents.
Images/Shapes/OLE rules: Keep the BaseUri property to resolve relative image paths.
Retain the shape iteration logic; it correctly extracts images from Shape nodes.
Layout rules: Ensure all Aspose.Words types (Document, ParagraphCollection, Section, Body, Node) are fully qualified by the using directive.
